670:   async function recoverInlineRunningDeployment(): Promise<boolean> {
671:     const latest = await getWorkspaceDeployment(env.DB, workspaceId, deploymentId);
672:     if (!latest || latest.status !== 'running') {
673:       return false;
674:     }
675: 
676:     if (latest.cancelRequestedAt) {
677:       await markDeploymentCancelled(env, workspaceId, deploymentId, 'cancel_requested');
678:       return true;
679:     }
680: 
681:     if (latest.attemptCount > latest.maxRetries) {
682:       return false;
683:     }
684: 
685:     await updateWorkspaceDeploymentStatus(env.DB, deploymentId, 'queued', {
686:       workspaceId,
687:       startedAt: null,
688:       finishedAt: null,
689:       errorCode: 'retry_scheduled',
690:       errorMessage: 'Recovered inline deployment retry after transient failure',
691:     });
692:     await appendWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(env.DB, {
693:       workspaceId,
694:       deploymentId,
695:       eventType: 'deployment_retry_scheduled',
696:       payload: { attemptCount: latest.attemptCount, maxRetries: latest.maxRetries, recoveredInline: true },
697:     });
698:     return true;

701:   for (let cycle = 0; cycle < maxCycles; cycle += 1) {

712:           if (recovered) {
713:             continue;
714:           }
715:         } catch {
716:           // Best-effort inline recovery only.
717:         }
718:       }
719:     }
720: 
721:     const latest = await getWorkspaceDeployment(env.DB, workspaceId, deploymentId);
722:     if (!latest) {

725:     if (latest.status !== 'queued') {
726:       return;
727:     }

747:     await updateWorkspaceDeploymentSummary(env.DB, workspaceId, {

750:       errorCode: null,

752:     });

754:   if (result.updated && result.deployment?.status === 'running') {
755:     await appendWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(env.DB, {

757:       deploymentId,

769:   if (isTransientFailure(error)) {

771:   }
772: 
773:   const message = error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error);
774:   return /(d1|database is locked|sqlite_busy|temporarily unavailable|connection reset)/i.test(message);
775: }

parts.text:
Reviewed the workspace deployment changes end-to-end (API, runner, queue, DB layer, migration, and routing), and I don’t see any blocking correctness issues in the implementation.

- The state transitions (`queued` -> `running` -> terminal), cancel flow, retry scheduling, and summary reconciliation logic are internally consistent.
- Idempotency handling in `createWorkspaceDeployment` looks robust, including conflict detection and race fallback behavior.
- Queue + inline execution paths are both wired correctly in `packages/worker/src/index.ts` and `packages/worker/src/api/workspace-deployments.ts`.
- New schema + response surface in `packages/worker/migrations/0007_workspace_deployments.sql`, `packages/worker/src/lib/db.ts`, and `packages/worker/src/types.ts` appear aligned.

I couldn’t run the test suite locally due an environment/runtime issue (`npm` failing with `Cannot find module 'node:path'`), so this is a static review.  
If you want, I can do a second pass focused only on failure/recovery edge cases (queue redelivery, duplicate cancellation, stale-running recovery) and propose hardening tweaks.
